Solayer LAYER Claims
Eligibility:Claiming opens in0D : 0H : 0M
The Solayer Genesis Drop introduces LAYER, the native governance token of the Solayer ecosystem, enabling the community to participate in key decisions that shape the future of the hardware accelerated SVM stack.
Genesis Drop
InfiniSVM
COMING SOON

Connect your wallet to check your eligibility
for the Genesis Drop claiming of the LAYER token.

Connect your wallet to view eligibility and claim LAYER.

network and ecosystem to enhance SVM scalability.
